posts.title: C++文件库实践 filesystem
posts.text:
C++ Filesystem library 该文件系统库可能会因为操作系统的实现方式的不同产生不同的结果，如FAT系统没有软链接(Symbolic Links)和多份硬链接(Hardlinks)，如果同时有多个线程、进程、计算机操作同一个文件系统对象，则行为为未定义(undefined) 文件一共分为以下几种类型： 文件夹(directory) 常规文件(regular file) 硬链接(hard link) 软链接(symbolic link) 文件路径也分为三种： 绝对路径(absolute path) 相对路径(relative path) canonical path 目标该文章旨在利用C++标准库filesystem实现一个计算文件夹大小的功能，获取一下所有大于512MB的文件夹，先看一看程序的运行效果 运行中 结果 看出来效果还是很成功的，一共遍历了206万个文件，找到了网易云音乐，照片图库，flutter的安装目录等这些大于512MB的文件位置，同时不会出现文件夹包含，如A文件夹中有B、C两个大于512MB的文件，那么只会列入B和C，而不会再列入A。 常用path类用来表明一个文件路径。 可以是: 绝对路径，如/usr/local/bin/ 相对路径，如./ 可以通过地址去构造一个path类 1std::filesystem::path p = "your path"; directory_iterator类非递归的遍历所有文件，即跳过文件夹 recursive_directory_iterator类相比directory_iterator可以同时遍历文件夹 directory_entry类从iterator类中用来遍历的迭代器，包含文件路径，额外的文件信息(包括文件类型，文件权限，文件大小…) 获取文件类型的函数通常是is_xxx开头 举例 12for (auto &p : std::filesystem::directory_iterator("./testDir")) if(p.is_regular_file()) std::cout << p.path() << '
'; current_path函数获取/设置当前目录 last_write_time函数获取/设置文件的最后修改时间 remove、remove_all函数删除/删除所有的文件 rename函数重命名 这四个函数都是采用path类作为主要的参数，这些参数都可以通过字符串字面量提供。 实践定义数据类型12345678910111213141516171819namespace type{ using u32 = unsigned int; enum fileType { fs_regular_file = 0, fs_directory = 1, fs_symlink = 2, fs_other = 3, fs_root = 4 }; enum sizeUnit { sz_byte = 0, sz_kb = 1, sz_mb = 2, sz_gb = 3 };} // namespace type 分别表示文件类型，和存储单位 定义单位转换函数1234567891011121314151617namespace util{ double convert_byte_to_unit(type::u32 size, type::sizeUnit unit) { type::u32 divisor = (1 << (unit * 10)); return static_cast<double>(size) / static_cast<double>(divisor); } type::u32 convert_unit_to_byte(double value, type::sizeUnit unit) {#ifdef RELEASE cerr << "您正在使用不被推荐的函数 convert_unit_to_byte";#endif type::u32 factor = (1 << (unit * 10)); return static_cast<double>(factor * value); }} // namespace util 定义存储文件的结构体12345678910111213struct node{ fs::file_time_type last_write_time; //最后修改时间 std::string name; //结点的名字 std::string prefix; //结点的前缀 用来计算下一个结点用 type::u32 size{}; //结点的大小 Byte(s) type::fileType filetype; //结点的类型 std::map<std::string, int> fileMap{}; //索引 名字->编号 std::vector<std::unique_ptr<node>> nodeHolder{}; //所有结点的索引 node() {} node(const std::string &_prefix, const std::string &_name, const type::fileType &_filetype) : prefix(_prefix), name(_name), filetype(_filetype) {}}; 定义文件遍历的相关操作文件树创建递归建树 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738void buildFSTree(){ fs::current_path(static_cast<fs::path>(this->prefix)); for (const auto &p : fs::directory_iterator("./")) { std::string actual_name = static_cast<std::string>(p.path()).substr(2); cerr << '' << ++totCnt << " files walked " << " " << slice_string_under_length(this->prefix + actual_name, 90) << ' ' << std::flush; // cout << actual_name << '
'; if (p.is_directory() && !p.is_symlink()) { // 递归扫描 auto temp = std::make_unique<node>(node{this->prefix + actual_name + "/", actual_name, type::fileType::fs_directory}); temp->last_write_time = p.last_write_time(); temp->buildFSTree(); fs::current_path(static_cast<fs::path>(this->prefix)); nodeHolder.push_back(std::move(temp)); fileMap.insert({p.path(), nodeHolder.size() - 1}); } else { if (p.is_symlink()) continue; auto temp = std::make_unique<node>(node{this->prefix + actual_name + "/", actual_name, type::fileType::fs_regular_file}); if (p.is_regular_file()) { temp->filetype = type::fileType::fs_regular_file; temp->last_write_time = p.last_write_time(); temp->size = p.file_size(); } else temp->filetype = type::fileType::fs_other; nodeHolder.push_back(std::move(temp)); fileMap.insert({p.path(), nodeHolder.size() - 1}); } }} 获取大小显然是一个递归操作，我们对于文件树上的每个节点求和，如果该节点是文件夹，那么先递归求解文件夹里的内容 123456789101112131415void calcSize(){ // this->size = 0; for (auto &_node : this->nodeHolder) { if (_node->filetype == type::fileType::fs_directory) { _node->calcSize(); this->size += _node->size; } if (_node->filetype == type::fileType::fs_regular_file) this->size += _node->size; // else discard }} 判断大于指定字节数的内容和上一个函数一样，递归判断，需要注意，如果该目录大于512MB，下级目录也大于512MB，那么该目录不应该显示上去，我们只显示最深层的大于512MB的目录，所以我们要有两个判断，一个判断是否大于512MB告诉上级的Node我们不需要输出了，一个用来判断下级给来的bool用check变量判断我们到底要不要输出了。 123456789101112131415161718bool print_more_than(type::u32 sz){ if (this->filetype != type::fileType::fs_regular_file && this->filetype != type::fileType::fs_directory) return false; bool check = false; for (const auto &item : this->nodeHolder) check |= item->print_more_than(sz); if (!check && this->size > sz) { cout << "条目: " << (this->filetype == type::fileType::fs_directory ? this->prefix : this->prefix.substr(0, this->prefix.size() - 1)) << " 大小: " << util::convert_byte_to_unit(this->size, type::sizeUnit::sz_mb) << " MB"; this->print_time(); } return this->size > sz;} 文件树类用来保存指定目录的根结点，通过构造函数完成建造树的过程，是对Node结点的一个封装 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344class filesystem{private: std::unique_ptr<node> root{}; std::string cur_path{};public: void debug(); filesystem(); void detect(type::u32 sz); ~filesystem() = default;};void filesystem::detect(type::u32 sz){ this->root->print_more_than(sz);}void filesystem::debug(){ for (const auto &p : this->root->nodeHolder) { auto printable_time = decltype(p->last_write_time)::clock::to_time_t(p->last_write_time); cout << p->name << " size-> " << util::convert_byte_to_unit(p->size, type::sizeUnit::sz_mb) << "MB" << ' ' << p->size << " time-> " << std::asctime(std::localtime(&printable_time)) << '
'; }}filesystem::filesystem(){ // 初始化root结点，即`/` this->root = std::make_unique<node>(); this->root->name = {}; this->root->size = -1; this->root->prefix = "/Users/xys/"; this->root->filetype = type::fileType::fs_directory; // 开始建立文件树 cerr << "构造文件树 " << this->root->prefix << '
'; this->root->buildFSTree(); cerr << '
'; cerr << "计算树上结点空间占用" << '
'; this->root->calcSize();} 接下来可以做什么？ 根据时间排序，找出不怎么修改的大文件夹 设定更多的搜索条件 利用文件树类，实现一个简易的文件搜索工具 全部代码#include <filesystem>#include <iostream>#include <fstream>#include <string>#include <map>#include <vector>#include <cassert>using std::cout, std::cin, std::cerr;namespace fs = std::filesystem;namespace type{ using u32 = unsigned int; enum fileType { fs_regular_file = 0, fs_directory = 1, fs_symlink = 2, fs_other = 3, fs_root = 4 }; enum sizeUnit { sz_byte = 0, sz_kb = 1, sz_mb = 2, sz_gb = 3 };} // namespace typenamespace util{ double convert_byte_to_unit(type::u32 size, type::sizeUnit unit) { type::u32 divisor = (1 << (unit * 10)); return static_cast<double>(size) / static_cast<double>(divisor); } type::u32 convert_unit_to_byte(double value, type::sizeUnit unit) {#ifdef RELEASE cerr << "您正在使用不被推荐的函数 convert_unit_to_byte";#endif type::u32 factor = (1 << (unit * 10)); return static_cast<double>(factor * value); }} // namespace utilint totCnt{};std::string slice_string_under_length(std::string a, int len){ if (a.length() > len) return a.substr(0, len / 2) + "......." + a.substr(a.length() - len / 2); return a;}struct node{ fs::file_time_type last_write_time; //最后修改时间 std::string name; //结点的名字 std::string prefix; //结点的前缀 用来计算下一个结点用 type::u32 size{}; //结点的大小 Byte(s) type::fileType filetype; //结点的类型 std::map<std::string, int> fileMap{}; //索引 名字->编号 std::vector<std::unique_ptr<node>> nodeHolder{}; //所有结点的索引 node() {} node(const std::string &_prefix, const std::string &_name, const type::fileType &_filetype) : prefix(_prefix), name(_name), filetype(_filetype) {} std::string getNextPath(const std::string &filename) { return prefix + name + "/" + filename; } void print_time() { auto printable_time = decltype(this->last_write_time)::clock::to_time_t(this->last_write_time); cout << " " << std::asctime(std::localtime(&printable_time)); } void calcSize() { // this->size = 0; for (auto &_node : this->nodeHolder) { if (_node->filetype == type::fileType::fs_directory) { _node->calcSize(); this->size += _node->size; } if (_node->filetype == type::fileType::fs_regular_file) this->size += _node->size; // else discard } } bool print_more_than(type::u32 sz) { if (this->filetype != type::fileType::fs_regular_file && this->filetype != type::fileType::fs_directory) return false; bool check = false; for (const auto &item : this->nodeHolder) check |= item->print_more_than(sz); if (!check && this->size > sz) { cout << "条目: " << (this->filetype == type::fileType::fs_directory ? this->prefix : this->prefix.substr(0, this->prefix.size() - 1)) << " 大小: " << util::convert_byte_to_unit(this->size, type::sizeUnit::sz_mb) << " MB"; this->print_time(); } return this->size > sz; } void buildFSTree() { fs::current_path(static_cast<fs::path>(this->prefix)); for (const auto &p : fs::directory_iterator("./")) { std::string actual_name = static_cast<std::string>(p.path()).substr(2); cerr << '' << ++totCnt << " files walked " << " " << slice_string_under_length(this->prefix + actual_name, 90) << ' ' << std::flush; // cout << actual_name << '
'; if (p.is_directory() && !p.is_symlink()) { // 递归扫描 auto temp = std::make_unique<node>(node{this->prefix + actual_name + "/", actual_name, type::fileType::fs_directory}); temp->last_write_time = p.last_write_time(); temp->buildFSTree(); fs::current_path(static_cast<fs::path>(this->prefix)); nodeHolder.push_back(std::move(temp)); fileMap.insert({p.path(), nodeHolder.size() - 1}); } else { if (p.is_symlink()) continue; auto temp = std::make_unique<node>(node{this->prefix + actual_name + "/", actual_name, type::fileType::fs_regular_file}); if (p.is_regular_file()) { temp->filetype = type::fileType::fs_regular_file; temp->last_write_time = p.last_write_time(); temp->size = p.file_size(); } else temp->filetype = type::fileType::fs_other; nodeHolder.push_back(std::move(temp)); fileMap.insert({p.path(), nodeHolder.size() - 1}); } } }};class filesystem{private: std::unique_ptr<node> root{}; std::string cur_path{};public: void debug(); filesystem(); void detect(type::u32 sz); ~filesystem() = default;};void filesystem::detect(type::u32 sz){ this->root->print_more_than(sz);}void filesystem::debug(){ for (const auto &p : this->root->nodeHolder) { auto printable_time = decltype(p->last_write_time)::clock::to_time_t(p->last_write_time); cout << p->name << " size-> " << util::convert_byte_to_unit(p->size, type::sizeUnit::sz_mb) << "MB" << ' ' << p->size << " time-> " << std::asctime(std::localtime(&printable_time)) << '
'; }}filesystem::filesystem(){ // 初始化root结点，即`/` this->root = std::make_unique<node>(); this->root->name = {}; this->root->size = -1; this->root->prefix = "/Users/xys/"; this->root->filetype = type::fileType::fs_directory; // 开始建立文件树 cerr << "构造文件树 " << this->root->prefix << '
'; this->root->buildFSTree(); cerr << '
'; cerr << "计算树上结点空间占用" << '
'; this->root->calcSize();}void self_test(){ // testConvert int source, recover; source = 0xffff; double byte_2_mb = util::convert_byte_to_unit(source, type::sizeUnit::sz_mb); cout << "bytes: " << source << " mbs: " << byte_2_mb << '
'; recover = util::convert_unit_to_byte(byte_2_mb, type::sizeUnit::sz_mb); assert(recover == source);}int main(){#ifndef RELEASE // self_test(); // cout << "自检通过";#endif cout << "欢迎使用文件大小统计功能" << '
'; filesystem fsTree{}; // fsTree.debug(); // 输出所有大于512MB的文件夹的位置 // 检测逻辑，如果这个文件夹大于500MB同时下级目录没有大于512MB的 fsTree.detect(util::convert_unit_to_byte(512.0, type::sizeUnit::sz_mb)); return 0;} 资料来源cpp reference

posts.title: learnCPP1
posts.text: C++学习(一)该系列博客用来记录自己学习C++总结下来的要点和经验。

posts.title: Ocaml Tree,  An Intuitive Tutorial
posts.text:
Ocaml Tree, An Intuitive Tutorial该文章主要描述了一些简单的树型数据结构。 基本树树形结构是一种非线性数据结构，在计算机科学领域有非常多的用途，一棵树由根和孩子组成，树是递归定义的，我们可以将树定义为一个type，他可以是空结点，也可以是一个非空结点，非空结点会有左、右两颗子树和值，我们可以将树定义为这样的结构。 1type 'a tree = Empty | Node of 'a * 'a tree * 'a tree 如构造一颗这样的树，我们就可以采用这样的方式。 该树的变量声明 1let node = Node(1, Node(5, Node(4, Empty, Empty),Node (2, Empty, Empty)), Node(3, Node(10,Empty,Node(17,Empty,Empty)), Node(14,Empty,Empty)));; 获取树的大小函数 123let rec size = function | Empty -> 0 | Node(_, left, right) -> 1 + size left + size right;; 先序、中序、后序遍历函数 1234567891011let rec preOrder = function| Empty -> ()| Node(v,l,r) -> Printf.printf"%d " v ; preOrder(l) ; preOrder(r);;let rec midOrder = function| Empty -> ()| Node(v,l,r) -> midOrder(l) ; Printf.printf"%d " v ; midOrder(r);;let rec postOrder = function| Empty -> ()| Node(v,l,r) -> postOrder(l) ; postOrder(r); Printf.printf"%d " v ;; 测试上述基本函数 1234567Printf.printf "树的大小为%d
" (size(node));printf "先序遍历
";preOrder node;printf "
中序遍历
";midOrder node;printf "
后序遍历
";postOrder node; 结果 1234567树的大小为8先序遍历1 5 4 2 3 10 17 14中序遍历4 5 2 1 10 17 3 14后序遍历4 2 5 17 10 14 3 1 二叉查找树在有了基本的树结构之后，我们考虑构建二叉查找树，二叉查找树在插入结点时，将比当前结点大的结点插到右子树，否则插入到左子树，如果按照 3-1-5-2-4-17-14-10 的顺序插入，会构建如下的二叉查找树。 为了构建这样一颗二叉树，同时加上纯函数式的限制，我们每次插入结点时都会建造一颗新的二叉树。 1234567let rec insert tree value = match tree with | Empty -> Node (value, Empty, Empty) | Node (v, left, right) -> if v = value then tree else if value > v then Node (v, insert left value, right) else Node (v, left, insert right value) 函数解释 该函数是二叉排序树的插入函数，插入数值已存在时不产生任何动作，直接返回该结点 插入数值小于当前结点 当前数值不变，右子树不变，那么就需要把这个值插入到左子树 插入数值大于当前结点 当前数字不变，左子树不变，那么就需要把这个值插入到右子树 如果碰到了空结点，那么就代表寻找到了合适的插入位置，将其插入并且返回 Node 函数测试 123456789101112(* 3-1-5-2-4-17-14-10 *)let node = insert Empty 3;;let node = insert node 1;;let node = insert node 5;;let node = insert node 2;;let node = insert node 4;;let node = insert node 17;;let node = insert node 14;;let node = insert node 10;;printf "
二叉排序树中序遍历
";midOrder node; 测试结果 12二叉排序树中序遍历1 2 3 4 5 10 14 17 结构验证 12345utop # node;;- : int tree =Node (3, Node (1, Empty, Node (2, Empty, Empty)), Node (5, Node (4, Empty, Empty), Node (17, Node (14, Node (10, Empty, Empty), Empty), Empty))) 对于二叉树排序树，有用的不仅仅是插入，还有查询和删除 查询函数 1234let rec query tree value = match tree with | Empty -> false | Node(v,l,r) -> v = value || query l value || query r value ;; 验证正确性 1234567let printBool = function| true -> printf"结果为真
";| false -> printf"结果为假
";;print_endline("");printBool (query node 10); (* should be true *)printBool (query node 11); (* should be false *) 删除函数 对于二叉排序树的删除，我们分三种情况 叶子结点，直接删除即可 只有单一的孩子，将这个孩子结点与其父结点相连 有左右孩子，寻找左子树最大结点$r$，覆盖该结点，此时删除直接完成 对应图例 情况 1，删除结点 2，2 直接移除连线 情况 2 删除结点 14，10 与 17 直接相连 情况 3 删除结点 3，2 替换 3 的位置 综上所述，我们可以得出下述的算法 如果该结点是叶子结点，直接返回Empty，删除完毕。 如果该结点是单孩子结点，直接返回他的孩子结点。 如果该结点有左右子树，把最左子树的最右子树替换到被删除结点，同时被删除结点的上一个结点的右子树修改为空，对于函数式语言来说，显然我们要做的是两步骤，在被删除结点修改当前值$v$，以及最左子树的最右子树，返回一个Empty和一个$v’$，所以我们这边需要一个新的函数去寻找左子树的最右子树 123456789101112131415161718(* 删除二叉排序树 *)(* Thanks for the reference https://codereview.stackexchange.com/questions/187716/deleting-a-node-from-binary-tree-in-ocaml *)let rec mostRight = function | Empty -> failwith "结点存在一些问题" | Node (v, _, Empty) -> v | Node (_, _, r) -> mostRight rlet rec delete tree value = match tree with | Empty -> Empty | Node (v, l, r) when v < value -> Node (v, l, delete r value) | Node (v, l, r) when v > value -> Node (v, delete l value, r) | Node (v, Empty, Empty) -> Empty (* 直接删除自己 对应情况1 *) | Node (v, Empty, r) -> r (* 情况2 删除自己 连接右子树 *) | Node (v, l, Empty) -> l (* 情况2 删除自己 连接左子树 *) | Node (v, l, r) -> (* 情况3，替换自己，删除原来的值 *) let newValue = mostRight l in Node (newValue, delete l newValue, r) 以及对应的测试 1234(* 测试删除 *)let delete2 = delete node 2let delete14 = delete node 14let delete3 = delete node 3 测试结果 12345678910111213val delete : 'a tree -> 'a -> 'a tree = <fun>val delete2 : int tree = Node (3, Node (1, Empty, Empty), Node (5, Node (4, Empty, Empty), Node (17, Node (14, Node (10, Empty, Empty), Empty), Empty)))val delete14 : int tree = Node (3, Node (1, Empty, Node (2, Empty, Empty)), Node (5, Node (4, Empty, Empty), Node (17, Node (10, Empty, Empty), Empty)))val delete3 : int tree = Node (2, Node (1, Empty, Empty), Node (5, Node (4, Empty, Empty), Node (17, Node (14, Node (10, Empty, Empty), Empty), Empty))) 可以看见确实成功的变成了我们图示的样子。 自平衡二叉树在一棵高度平衡的二叉排序树中，我们几乎可以以$\log n$的时间开销去寻找元素，但是考虑特殊构造的数据$1,2,3..n$，就会让二叉排序树退化成一个线性链表，这显然是我们无法接受的，我们给结点定义一个平衡因子，表示左右子树的深度之差， 一般将其分为四种情况考虑，用$L$表示左子树不平衡，$R$表示右子树不平衡，一共有四种情况。 请注意这些序号并不表示数据本身的大小，只是一个逻辑关系。 RR(数字不代表数值关系) 这样的树我们可以我们可以在子树3处做一次左旋操作，使得树变成平衡状态，具体操作是1旋转下去，同时原先4的位置被1接管，那么显然3的原左子树将成为1的右子树，这样完成了一次左旋操作，如果你不能理解这个过程，请务必亲手尝试一下，并结合下面的代码阅读，所谓左旋也并非只是向左旋转，请不要将重心过度放在左旋这个动作本身的语义上。 LL(数字不代表数值关系) 这种情况和RR型真好相反，我们对2做一次右旋操作就可以达成目的，具体可以查看旋转后的图片自行想象。 RL(数字不代表数值关系) 这种情况通过一次L旋转或者R旋转都无法使得二叉树平衡，对应的，我们需要进行一次右旋再进行一次左旋，具体的流程图如下 首先进行一次右旋，注意目标是失去平衡结点的右子树。 然后此时变成了RR型结点，在进行一次左旋。 LR(数字代表数值关系)此次采用了真实数据，数据大小即代表真实的结点情况 首先进行左旋 再进行一次右旋 对于这种数据结构，我们的核心就是两种操作，左旋、右旋。 这边是一年前的数据结构课设的 C 语言 AVL 树代码，通过下面的代码，希望能够给你一个更加直观地、大致上的我们印象，让你要知道如何操作 AVL 树来使它达成平衡的目的。 左右旋12345678910111213141516171819node *rightRotation(node *root){ //右旋 left提到root位置，root下去，同时root接管left的右儿子（root左儿子） node *tmp = root->leftSon; root->leftSon = tmp->rightSon; tmp->rightSon = root; getTreeHeight(tmp); return tmp;}node *leftRotation(node *root){ //左旋 right提到root位置，root下去，root接管left的左儿子 （root右儿子） node *tmp = root->rightSon; root->rightSon = tmp->leftSon; tmp->leftSon = root; getTreeHeight(tmp); //新跟节点重新判深度 return tmp; //新结点 是否要用于下一步旋转} 二叉树的重新平衡1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041node *rebalance(node *root){ int balance = getTreeBalance(root); // printf("balance = %d
", balance); if (balance > 1) { //L? 操作 if (getTreeBalance(root->leftSon) > 0) { //LL 对应左子树更多 printf("LL
"); return rightRotation(root); } else { //LR 对应右子树更多 //下级L 这级R printf("LR
"); root->leftSon = leftRotation(root->leftSon); return rightRotation(root); } } if (balance < -1) { //R? 操作 if (getTreeBalance(root->rightSon) < 0) { //RR 对应右子树更多 printf("RR
"); return leftRotation(root); } else { //RL printf("RL
"); root->rightSon = rightRotation(root->rightSon); return leftRotation(root); } } return NULL;} 编写二叉树辅助输出函数一个求幂的函数 1let rec pow base power = if power = 0 then 1 else base * pow base (power - 1) 对应函数的尾递归版本，尾递归版本拥有更快的速度和更少的内存占用，非常值得提倡 1234let pow_tr base power = let rec _pow_tr base power sum = if power = 0 then sum else _pow_tr base (power - 1) (base * sum) in _pow_tr base power 1 访问Link学习更多有关尾递归的知识 具体实现首先需要一个新的构造子，之前的构造子并不包含有关深度的信息，对于自平衡二叉树来说，我们还需要关注到他树的深度。 1type 'a avlTree = Empty | Node of 'a * 'a avlTree * 'a avlTree * int 左旋和右旋我们在 Ocaml 中能够使用一种更加优雅的方式去处理，模式匹配可以直接把我们需要的两个受到影响的点取出来建造新的结点，代码会变得异常的短。左旋就是重新生成了一个结点，将该结点的数值变成了右子树的数值，将左子树变为了一个新建的结点，这个过程和前面的描述是一样的，该步骤完成之后整一个旋转过程就直接完成了，剩余的东西我们无需再去管理，和C 语言版本对比，因为我们不需要去处理指针的指向，我们将所有的结点都视作 avlTree 的构造子类型，就可以通过不断构造去新建受影响的结点，不需要向 C 语言一样去修改不同点之间的逻辑关系。 12345678910111213141516171819(* 辅助生成结点的函数 因为要动态控制树的高度 *)let makeNode value leftTree rightTree = Node ( value , leftTree , rightTree , 1 + max (avlHeight leftTree) (avlHeight rightTree) )let avlHeight = function Empty -> 0 | Node (_, _, _, h) -> h(* 左旋 *)let rotateLeft = function | Node (v, l, Node (_v, _l, _r, _), _) -> makeNode _v (makeNode v l _l) _r | _ -> failwith "Error"(* 右旋 *)let rotateRight = function | Node (v, Node (_v, _l, _r, _), r, _) -> makeNode _v _l (makeNode v _r r) | _ -> failwith "Error" LR 情况判断 以及 左右旋转我们利用之前的函数就可以完成 LR 情况的判断，具体的判断流程是如果该结点为Empty结点，我们可以直接插入该结点，否则的话就需要递归插入这个结点，根据插入之后的情况来判断是否需要左右旋转， 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728let rec insert tree value = match tree with | Empty -> Node (value, Empty, Empty, 1) | Node (v, l, r, _) -> ( if v = value then tree else if value < v then (* 如何判断插入之后是否需要左右旋转 我们需要插入后的树的高度 *) match insert l value with | Empty -> failwith "Error" | Node (_v, _l, _r, _h) as _node -> if _h - avlHeight r <= 1 then makeNode v _node r (* 直接插入这个结点不需要旋转 *) else let _node = (* 根据前面的描述判断是否需要多旋转一次 *) if avlHeight _l < avlHeight _r then rotateLeft _node else _node in rotateRight (makeNode v _node r) (* L? 情况通用的右旋 *) else match insert r value with | Empty -> failwith "Error" | Node (_v, _l, _r, _h) as _node -> if _h - avlHeight l <= 1 then makeNode v l _node else let _node = if avlHeight _l > avlHeight _r then rotateRight _node else _node in rotateLeft (makeNode v l _node) ) 插入测试RR1234let avlNode = insert Empty 10let avlNode = insert avlNode 20let avlNode = insert avlNode 30let avlNode = insert avlNode 40 1234567val avlNode : int avlTree = Node (10, Empty, Empty, 1)val avlNode : int avlTree = Node (10, Empty, Node (20, Empty, Empty, 1), 2)val avlNode : int avlTree = Node (20, Node (10, Empty, Empty, 1), Node (30, Empty, Empty, 1), 2)val avlNode : int avlTree = Node (20, Node (10, Empty, Empty, 1), Node (30, Empty, Node (40, Empty, Empty, 1), 2), 3) 旋转过程 LL分别插入40 30 20 10 1234567val avlNode : int avlTree = Node (40, Empty, Empty, 1)val avlNode : int avlTree = Node (40, Node (30, Empty, Empty, 1), Empty, 2)val avlNode : int avlTree = Node (30, Node (20, Empty, Empty, 1), Node (40, Empty, Empty, 1), 2)val avlNode : int avlTree = Node (30, Node (20, Node (10, Empty, Empty, 1), Empty, 2), Node (40, Empty, Empty, 1), 3) 12345 30 / \ 20 40 /10 验证正确 LR分别插入30 10 20 123val avlNode : int avlTree = Node (30, Empty, Empty, 1)val avlNode : int avlTree = Node (30, Node (10, Empty, Empty, 1), Empty, 2)val avlNode : int avlTree = Node (20, Node (10, Empty, Empty, 1), Node (30, Empty, Empty, 1), 2) 123 20 / \10 30 验证正确 RL分别插入10 30 20 123val avlNode : int avlTree = Node (10, Empty, Empty, 1)val avlNode : int avlTree = Node (10, Empty, Node (30, Empty, Empty, 1), 2)val avlNode : int avlTree = Node (20, Node (10, Empty, Empty, 1), Node (30, Empty, Empty, 1), 2) 123 20 / \10 30 验证正确 插入较多的数字123456789101112let avlNode = insert Empty 10let avlNode = insert avlNode 30let avlNode = insert avlNode 20let avlNode = insert avlNode 25let avlNode = insert avlNode 34let avlNode = insert avlNode 37let avlNode = insert avlNode 39let avlNode = insert avlNode 22let avlNode = insert avlNode 16let avlNode = insert avlNode 13let avlNode = insert avlNode 3let avlNode = insert avlNode 7 12345678val avlNode : int avlTree = Node (20, Node (13, Node (7, Node (3, Empty, Empty, 1), Node (10, Empty, Empty, 1), 2), Node (16, Empty, Empty, 1), 3), Node (30, Node (25, Node (22, Empty, Empty, 1), Empty, 2), Node (37, Node (34, Empty, Empty, 1), Node (39, Empty, Empty, 1), 2), 3), 4) 结果图示 1234567 20 /--- ---\ 13 30 / \ / \ 7 16 25 37 / \ / / \3 10 22 34 39 应该没有太多的问题 删除结点删除结点的过程和 BST 删除类似，唯一的区别是删除完之后需要重新调整平衡，有可能删除完之后会造成树失去平衡，步骤和insert差不多，请自行思考，如果思考不了看 C 语言版本。 排序数据输出(中序遍历)123let rec avlMidOrder = function | Empty -> () | Node (v, l, r, _) -> avlMidOrder l ; printf "%d " v ; avlMidOrder r 结果 13 7 10 13 16 20 22 25 30 34 37 39 哈夫曼树哈夫曼树是哈夫曼编码的一种求解方式，我们可以利用这种数据结构给数据进行一种编码，原则就是出现次数多的字符使用更短的编码，次数少的字符使用更长的编码，可以采用堆这一个数据结构求解该编码，翻出去年的数据结构课设希望能够有一种直观的理解。 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829CoreType::node *getHuffmanTreeByCntArray(vector<pair<char, int>> &frequencyArray){ using CoreType::node; struct cmp //functor { bool operator()(const node *a, const node *b) { return a->weight >= b->weight; } }; priority_queue<node *, vector<node *>, cmp> assistHeap; //初始化 for (auto [ch, cnt] : frequencyArray) { node *tmpNode = new node{nullptr, nullptr, cnt, int(ch)}; assistHeap.push(tmpNode); } while (assistHeap.size() != 1) { node *firstNode = assistHeap.top(); assistHeap.pop(); node *secondNode = assistHeap.top(); assistHeap.pop(); node *newNode = new node{firstNode, secondNode, firstNode->weight + secondNode->weight, -1}; // cout << "Combine " << firstNode->weight << " With " << secondNode->weight << endl; assistHeap.push(newNode); } return assistHeap.top();} 测试给定哈夫曼树结点能否生成编码 构造如图所示的哈夫曼树，下面表示应该的编码方式 1234567let nodell = HuffmanNode {data= Some 'a'; count= 0; left= Empty; right= Empty}let nodelr = HuffmanNode {data= Some 'c'; count= 0; left= Empty; right= Empty}let noderl = HuffmanNode {data= Some 'b'; count= 0; left= Empty; right= Empty}let noderr = HuffmanNode {data= Some 'd'; count= 0; left= Empty; right= Empty}let nodel = HuffmanNode {data= None; count= 0; left= nodell; right= nodelr}let noder = HuffmanNode {data= None; count= 0; left= noderl; right= noderr}let testNode = HuffmanNode {data= None; count= 0; left= nodel; right= noder} 定义哈夫曼树的数据结构12345type optional_char = Some of char | Nonetype huffmanTree = Empty | HuffmanNode of huffmanNodeand huffmanNode = {data: optional_char * int; count: int; left: huffmanTree; right: huffmanTree} 我们的哈夫曼树也是一颗树，但他会额外拥有一个count属性来表明当前这个结点的计算次数，同时他的数据是可选类型，因为从上文的哈夫曼树例子我们可以看出，只有叶子结点会挂载数据。 我们实现哈夫曼的过程本质上就是优先队列上不断取出和合并的过程，因此我们需要再做一个优先队列，优先队列可以做成模块，通过函子(functor)去初始化模块，增加泛型开发的能力。 12345module type Comparable = sig type t val compare : t -> t -> intend 1234567891011121314151617181920module Make_priority_queue (QueueNode : Comparable) = struct let top = function | hd :: tl -> hd | [] -> failwith "没有更多结点了 Error on top" let pop = function | hd :: tl -> tl | [] -> failwith "没有更多结点了 Error on pop" let rec push queue value = match queue with | [] -> [value] | hd :: tl -> if QueueNode.compare value hd > 0 then value :: queue else hd :: push tl value let rec size = function _ :: tl -> 1 + size tl | [] -> 0 let empty = function hd :: tl -> false | [] -> true let newQueue : QueueNode.t list = []end 构造一个int类型的优先队列模块及测试 1234567891011121314151617181920212223module Int_priority_queue = Make_priority_queue (struct type t = int let compare a b = a - bend)let priority_queue = Int_priority_queue.push [] 1let priority_queue = Int_priority_queue.push priority_queue 5let priority_queue = Int_priority_queue.push priority_queue 3let priority_queue = Int_priority_queue.push priority_queue 2let priority_queue = Int_priority_queue.push priority_queue 4let rec int_priority_queue_print_helper = function | [] -> () | hd :: tl -> Printf.printf "%d " hd ; int_priority_queue_print_helper tl;;printf "
";;int_priority_queue_print_helper priority_queue;;printf "
" 运行结果 12- : unit = ()5 4 3 2 1 - : unit = () 非常成功，因此我们现在可以直接考虑哈夫曼树所需要用的额外函数。 合并两棵树 注意合并操作之后我们要把data字段变为空，否则我们将无法区别叶子结点和非叶子结点 12345let huffmanMergeTwoTree leftTree rightTree : huffmanNode = { data= (None, leftTree.count + rightTree.count) ; count= leftTree.count + rightTree.count ; left= HuffmanNode leftTree ; right= HuffmanNode rightTree } 新建一个叶子结点 12let newHuffmanNode _data count : huffmanNode = {data= (Some _data, count); count; left= Empty; right= Empty} 构建一个哈夫曼优先队列 12345module Huffman_priority_queue = Make_priority_queue (struct type t = huffmanNode let compare left right = right.count - left.countend) 创建初始状态 即不断的通过新建结点的方式生成叶子结点并且push入优先队列中 12345678let _huffmanQueue = ref Huffman_priority_queue.newQueuelet rec buildInitialHuffmanQueue = function | hd :: tl -> _huffmanQueue := Huffman_priority_queue.push !_huffmanQueue (newHuffmanNode (fst hd) (snd hd)) ; buildInitialHuffmanQueue tl | [] -> () 循环构建哈夫曼树 因为这个操作用命令式语言的while循环会让思路变的比较清晰，所以这边还是选择了while来判断出口，或者为了FP的思想我们可以match队列的size来判断出口但是这样实在是有些牵强感觉，对于这种数据结构和算法而言还是while比较直观。 12345678let generateHuffmanTreeByPriorityQueue queue = while Huffman_priority_queue.size !queue <> 1 do let a = Huffman_priority_queue.top !queue in let _ = queue := Huffman_priority_queue.pop !queue in let b = Huffman_priority_queue.top !queue in let _ = queue := Huffman_priority_queue.pop !queue in queue := Huffman_priority_queue.push !queue (huffmanMergeTwoTree a b) done 根据树结构生成哈夫曼编码 123456789101112let generateHuffmanCodeByTree tree = let code = ref [] in let rec generateCode nowCode tree = match tree with | Empty -> () | HuffmanNode {data; count; left; right} -> ( match data with | None, _ -> generateCode (nowCode ^ "0") left ; generateCode (nowCode ^ "1") right | Some _data, _ -> code := (data, nowCode) :: !code ) in generateCode "" tree ; code 测试及结果1234567891011121314151617let testData = []let testData = ('a', 100) :: testDatalet testData = ('b', 40) :: testDatalet testData = ('c', 20) :: testDatalet testData = ('d', 80) :: testDatalet testData = ('e', 90) :: testDatalet testData = ('f', 30) :: testDatalet testData = ('g', 888) :: testDatalet testData = ('h', 66) :: testData;;buildInitialHuffmanQueue testDatalet my_huffman_tree = generateHuffmanTreeByPriorityQueue _huffmanQueuelet treeTemp = HuffmanNode (Huffman_priority_queue.top !_huffmanQueue)let huffmanCode = generateHuffmanCodeByTree (treeTemp) 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758596061626364val treeTemp : huffmanTree = HuffmanNode {data = (None, 1314); count = 1314; left = HuffmanNode {data = (None, 426); count = 426; left = HuffmanNode {data = (None, 180); count = 180; left = HuffmanNode {data = (Some 'e', 90); count = 90; left = Empty; right = Empty}; right = HuffmanNode {data = (None, 90); count = 90; left = HuffmanNode {data = (Some 'b', 40); count = 40; left = Empty; right = Empty}; right = HuffmanNode {data = (None, 50); count = 50; left = HuffmanNode {data = (Some 'c', 20); count = 20; left = Empty; right = Empty}; right = HuffmanNode {data = (Some 'f', 30); count = 30; left = Empty; right = Empty}}}}; right = HuffmanNode {data = (None, 246); count = 246; left = HuffmanNode {data = (Some 'a', 100); count = 100; left = Empty; right = Empty}; right = HuffmanNode {data = (None, 146); count = 146; left = HuffmanNode {data = (Some 'h', 66); count = 66; left = Empty; right = Empty}; right = HuffmanNode {data = (Some 'd', 80); count = 80; left = Empty; right = Empty}}}}; right = HuffmanNode {data = (Some 'g', 888); count = 888; left = Empty; right = Empty}}val huffmanCode : ((optional_char * int) * string) list ref = {contents = [((Some 'g', 888), "1"); ((Some 'd', 80), "0111"); ((Some 'h', 66), "0110"); ((Some 'a', 100), "010"); ((Some 'f', 30), "00111"); ((Some 'c', 20), "00110"); ((Some 'b', 40), "0010"); ((Some 'e', 90), "000")]} 感谢观看 Reference, toolsJava tree printer By Stackoverflow Ocaml AVL Tree Real World Ocaml Graph Editor deletion in BST in ocaml By Stackoverflow 孙涵、高航等.数据结构抽象建模、实现与应用[M].北京:机械工业出版社.2020.130-140 Source  Printftype 'a tree = Empty | Node of 'a * 'a tree * 'a treelet node = Node ( 1 , Node (5, Node (4, Empty, Empty), Node (2, Empty, Empty)) , Node (3, Node (10, Empty, Node (17, Empty, Empty)), Node (14, Empty, Empty)) )let rec size = function | Empty -> 0 | Node (_, left, right) -> 1 + size left + size rightlet rec preOrder = function | Empty -> () | Node (v, l, r) -> Printf.printf "%d " v ; preOrder l ; preOrder rlet rec midOrder = function | Empty -> () | Node (v, l, r) -> midOrder l ; Printf.printf "%d " v ; midOrder rlet rec postOrder = function | Empty -> () | Node (v, l, r) -> postOrder l ; postOrder r ; Printf.printf "%d " v;;Printf.printf "树的大小为%d
" (size node) ;printf "先序遍历
" ;preOrder node ;printf "
中序遍历
" ;midOrder node ;printf "
后序遍历
" ;postOrder node(* 该函数是二叉排序树的插入函数，插入数值已存在时不产生任何动作，直接返回该结点 *)(* 插入数值小于当前结点 当前数值不变，右子树不变，那么就需要把这个值插入到左子树 *)(* 插入数值大于当前结点 当前数字不变，左子树不变，那么就需要把这个值插入到右子树 *)(* 如果碰到了空结点，那么就代表寻找到了合适的插入位置，将其插入 *)let rec insert tree value = match tree with | Empty -> Node (value, Empty, Empty) | Node (v, left, right) -> if v = value then tree else if value < v then Node (v, insert left value, right) else Node (v, left, insert right value)(* 3-1-5-2-4-17-14-10 *)let node = insert Empty 3let node = insert node 1let node = insert node 5let node = insert node 2let node = insert node 4let node = insert node 17let node = insert node 14let node = insert node 10;;printf "
二叉排序树中序遍历
" ;midOrder nodelet rec query tree value = match tree with | Empty -> false | Node (v, l, r) -> v = value || query l value || query r valuelet printBool = function | true -> printf "结果为真
" | false -> printf "结果为假
";;print_endline "" ;printBool (query node 10) ;(* should be true *)printBool (query node 11)(* should be false *)(* Print Helper *)let eq a b = a = b(* 删除二叉排序树 *)(* Thanks for the reference https://codereview.stackexchange.com/questions/187716/deleting-a-node-from-binary-tree-in-ocaml *)let rec mostRight = function | Empty -> failwith "结点存在一些问题" | Node (v, _, Empty) -> v | Node (_, _, r) -> mostRight rlet rec delete tree value = match tree with | Empty -> Empty | Node (v, l, r) when v < value -> Node (v, l, delete r value) | Node (v, l, r) when v > value -> Node (v, delete l value, r) | Node (v, Empty, Empty) -> Empty (* 直接删除自己 对应情况1 *) | Node (v, Empty, r) -> r (* 情况2 删除自己 连接右子树*) | Node (v, l, Empty) -> l (* 情况2 删除自己 连接左子树*) | Node (v, l, r) -> (* 情况3，替换自己，删除原来的值 *) let newValue = mostRight l in Node (newValue, delete l newValue, r)(* 测试删除 *)let delete2 = delete node 2let delete14 = delete node 14let delete3 = delete node 3let max x y = if x > y then x else ylet rec getHeight = function | Empty -> 0 | Node (_, l, r) -> max (getHeight l) (getHeight r) + 1let rec pow base power = if power = 0 then 1 else base * pow base (power - 1)let pow_tr base power = let rec _pow_tr base power sum = if power = 0 then sum else _pow_tr base (power - 1) (base * sum) in _pow_tr base power 1let h = getHeight node;;printf "树的高度 %d
" h(*绘图规则一行数字 一行辅助线*)(* ┌ ─ ┐ └ ┴ ┘*)type 'a avlTree = Empty | Node of 'a * 'a avlTree * 'a avlTree * intlet avlHeight = function Empty -> 0 | Node (_, _, _, h) -> hlet makeNode value leftTree rightTree = Node ( value , leftTree , rightTree , 1 + max (avlHeight leftTree) (avlHeight rightTree) )let rec find avlTreeNode value = match avlTreeNode with | Empty -> false | Node (v, l, r, _) -> ( match v = value with | true -> true | false when v < value -> find l v | false -> find r v )(* 左旋 *)let rotateLeft = function | Node (v, l, Node (_v, _l, _r, _), _) -> makeNode _v (makeNode v l _l) _r | _ -> failwith "Error"(* 右旋 *)let rotateRight = function | Node (v, Node (_v, _l, _r, _), r, _) -> makeNode _v _l (makeNode v _r r) | _ -> failwith "Error"let rec insert tree value = match tree with | Empty -> Node (value, Empty, Empty, 1) | Node (v, l, r, _) -> ( if v = value then tree else if value < v then (* 如何判断插入之后是否需要左右旋转 我们需要插入后的树的高度 *) match insert l value with | Empty -> failwith "Error" | Node (_v, _l, _r, _h) as _node -> if _h - avlHeight r <= 1 then makeNode v _node r (* 直接插入这个结点不需要旋转 *) else let _node = (* 根据前面的描述判断是否需要多旋转一次 *) if avlHeight _l < avlHeight _r then rotateLeft _node else _node in rotateRight (makeNode v _node r) (* L? 情况通用的右旋 *) else match insert r value with | Empty -> failwith "Error" | Node (_v, _l, _r, _h) as _node -> if _h - avlHeight l <= 1 then makeNode v l _node else let _node = if avlHeight _l > avlHeight _r then rotateRight _node else _node in rotateLeft (makeNode v l _node) )let avlNode = insert Empty 10let avlNode = insert avlNode 30let avlNode = insert avlNode 20let avlNode = insert avlNode 25let avlNode = insert avlNode 34let avlNode = insert avlNode 37let avlNode = insert avlNode 39let avlNode = insert avlNode 22let avlNode = insert avlNode 16let avlNode = insert avlNode 13let avlNode = insert avlNode 3let avlNode = insert avlNode 7let rec avlMidOrder = function | Empty -> () | Node (v, l, r, _) -> avlMidOrder l ; printf "%d " v ; avlMidOrder r;;print_newline ();;avlMidOrder avlNode  Printf(* 一个优先队列的简单实现，需要的是参数的类型和比较函数 *)module type Comparable = sig type t val compare : t -> t -> intendmodule Make_priority_queue (QueueNode : Comparable) = struct let top = function | hd :: tl -> hd | [] -> failwith "没有更多结点了 Error on getTop" let pop = function | hd :: tl -> tl | [] -> failwith "没有更多结点了 Error on pop" let rec push queue value = match queue with | [] -> [value] | hd :: tl -> if QueueNode.compare value hd > 0 then value :: queue else hd :: push tl value let rec size = function _ :: tl -> 1 + size tl | [] -> 0 let empty = function hd :: tl -> false | [] -> true let newQueue : QueueNode.t list = []endmodule Int_priority_queue = Make_priority_queue (struct type t = int let compare a b = a - bend)let priority_queue = Int_priority_queue.push [] 1let priority_queue = Int_priority_queue.push priority_queue 5let priority_queue = Int_priority_queue.push priority_queue 3let priority_queue = Int_priority_queue.push priority_queue 2let priority_queue = Int_priority_queue.push priority_queue 4let rec int_priority_queue_print_helper = function | [] -> () | hd :: tl -> Printf.printf "%d " hd ; int_priority_queue_print_helper tl;;printf "
";;int_priority_queue_print_helper priority_queue;;printf "
"let priority_queue = ref priority_queuelet rec pop_all_elements queue_ref = while Int_priority_queue.empty !queue_ref do let queue_value_head = Int_priority_queue.top !queue_ref in printf "%d " queue_value_head ; queue_ref := Int_priority_queue.pop !queue_ref done;;pop_all_elements priority_queuetype optional_char = Some of char | None(* test for Some type *)module Some_char_priority_queue = Make_priority_queue (struct type t = optional_char * int let compare a b = snd b - snd a (* 出现次数多的符号放在最后merge *)end)let huffman_queue = Some_char_priority_queue.newQueuelet huffman_queue = Some_char_priority_queue.push huffman_queue (Some 'a', 20)let huffman_queue = Some_char_priority_queue.push huffman_queue (Some 'b', 40)let huffman_queue = Some_char_priority_queue.push huffman_queue (Some 'c', 25)let huffman_queue = Some_char_priority_queue.push huffman_queue (Some 'd', 40)let huffman_queue = Some_char_priority_queue.push huffman_queue (Some 'e', 10)let huffman_queue = Some_char_priority_queue.push huffman_queue (Some 'f', 30)(* 定义哈夫曼树 *)type huffmanTree = Empty | HuffmanNode of huffmanNodeand huffmanNode = {data: optional_char * int; count: int; left: huffmanTree; right: huffmanTree}let huffmanMergeTwoTree leftTree rightTree : huffmanNode = { data= (None, leftTree.count + rightTree.count) ; count= leftTree.count + rightTree.count ; left= HuffmanNode leftTree ; right= HuffmanNode rightTree }let newHuffmanNode _data count : huffmanNode = {data= (Some _data, count); count; left= Empty; right= Empty}module Huffman_priority_queue = Make_priority_queue (struct type t = huffmanNode let compare left right = right.count - left.countend)(* dataList => char * int *)let _huffmanQueue = ref Huffman_priority_queue.newQueuelet rec buildInitialHuffmanQueue = function | hd :: tl -> _huffmanQueue := Huffman_priority_queue.push !_huffmanQueue (newHuffmanNode (fst hd) (snd hd)) ; buildInitialHuffmanQueue tl | [] -> ()let testData = []let testData = ('a', 100) :: testDatalet testData = ('b', 40) :: testDatalet testData = ('c', 20) :: testDatalet testData = ('d', 80) :: testDatalet testData = ('e', 90) :: testDatalet testData = ('f', 30) :: testDatalet testData = ('g', 888) :: testDatalet testData = ('h', 66) :: testData;;buildInitialHuffmanQueue testDatalet generateHuffmanTreeByPriorityQueue queue = while Huffman_priority_queue.size !queue <> 1 do let a = Huffman_priority_queue.top !queue in let _ = queue := Huffman_priority_queue.pop !queue in let b = Huffman_priority_queue.top !queue in let _ = queue := Huffman_priority_queue.pop !queue in queue := Huffman_priority_queue.push !queue (huffmanMergeTwoTree a b) donelet my_huffman_tree = generateHuffmanTreeByPriorityQueue _huffmanQueuelet generateHuffmanCodeByTree tree = let code = ref [] in let rec generateCode nowCode tree = match tree with | Empty -> () | HuffmanNode {data; count; left; right} -> ( match data with | None, _ -> generateCode (nowCode ^ "0") left ; generateCode (nowCode ^ "1") right | Some _data, _ -> code := (data, nowCode) :: !code ) in generateCode "" tree ; codelet treeTemp = HuffmanNode (Huffman_priority_queue.top !_huffmanQueue)let huffmanCode = generateHuffmanCodeByTree (treeTemp) 所有函数列表(AVL)12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728type 'a tree = Empty | Node of 'a * 'a tree * 'a treeval size : 'a tree -> int = <fun>val preOrder : int tree -> unit = <fun>val midOrder : int tree -> unit = <fun>val postOrder : int tree -> unit = <fun>val insert : 'a tree -> 'a -> 'a tree = <fun>val query : 'a tree -> 'a -> bool = <fun>val printBool : bool -> unit = <fun>val eq : 'a -> 'a -> bool = <fun>val mostRight : 'a tree -> 'a = <fun>val delete : 'a tree -> 'a -> 'a tree = <fun>val max : 'a -> 'a -> 'a = <fun>val getHeight : 'a tree -> int = <fun>val pow : int -> int -> int = <fun>val pow_tr : int -> int -> int = <fun>val h : int = 5type 'a avlTree = Empty | Node of 'a * 'a avlTree * 'a avlTree * intval avlHeight : 'a avlTree -> int = <fun>val makeNode : 'a -> 'a avlTree -> 'a avlTree -> 'a avlTree = <fun>val find : 'a avlTree -> 'a -> bool = <fun>val rotateLeft : 'a avlTree -> 'a avlTree = <fun>val rotateRight : 'a avlTree -> 'a avlTree = <fun>val insert : 'a avlTree -> 'a -> 'a avlTree = <fun>val avlMidOrder : int avlTree -> unit = <fun>
